signals.headline: CLARITY Act Gains Key Endorsements from Coinbase CEO, Clearing Path for XRP Commodity Classification | YES | HIGH confid
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Gains Key Endorsements from Coinbase CEO, Clearing Path for XRP Commodity Classification | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong endorsed the CLARITY Act on April 9, 2026, reversing prior opposition and removing a major hurdle ahead of Senate Banking Committee markup in late April; this could classify XRP as a digital commodity, unlocking $4–8B in ETF inflows.[2][5]
